sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_events (event_id INTEGER, start_time TIME, end_time TIME);
INSERT INTO time_events (event_id, start_time, end_time) VALUES (1, TIME '01:00:00', TIME '03:00:00');
INSERT INTO time_events (event_id, start_time, end_time) VALUES (2, TIME '02:00:00', TIME '05:30:00');
SELECT event_id, datediff('hour', start_time, end_time) AS hour_diff FROM time_events;
UPDATE time_events SET end_time = TIME '04:00:00' WHERE event_id = 1;
